creator: freebsd-pr@xbsd.net
text:
When connecting an iRiver H10 mp3 player to the freebsd computer the following is printed to the console:
umass0: <iriver Limited iriver H10 Jr., class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 3> on uhub1
da0 at umass-sim0 bus 0 target 0 lun 0
da0: <iriver H10 Jr. Pure 1.00> Removable Direct Access SCSI-2 device 
da0: 1.000MB/s transfers
da0: 997MB (2041856 512 byte sectors: 64H 32S/T 997C)
umass0: Phase Error, residue = 0
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): Synchronize cache failed, status == 0x4, scsi status == 0x0
umass0: Phase Error, residue = 0
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): Synchronize cache failed, status == 0x4, scsi status == 0x0

Fix: This can fixed by patching src/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_da.c with:
